raw_consumer_statement:
A charge was made on my card on XXXX XXXXXXXX XXXX for {$1300.00} at a XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX in Pennsylvania ( several states away from where I live ). I have never even been to Pennsylvania aside from a brief layover about a decade ago. 

I flagged the transaction as fraud. 

American Express denied the dispute, and never asked me for more information. 

I asked them again to look into the dispute, and it was closed with the message " After reviewing the information you provided and the circumstances of the transaction, we believe the charge to be valid. As a result, the transaction will remain on your account. '' It is not a valid charge, it is fraudulent.
